title: Pan-Seared Asparagus with Croatian Paella and Crostini
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines the freshness of asparagus with the savory goodness of Croatian paella and crispy crostini.
instructions: Toss asparagus with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 12-15 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, slice crostini into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Heat a small skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced crostini and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
Serve roasted asparagus with Croatian paella and toasted crostini.
Garnish with fresh parsley or lemon wedges, if desired.
